'''''Pizzazz'' 14''' is the fourteenth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[November]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 14" />

The issue also includes the article "The Damsels," discussing women in science fiction movies and featuring [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]].<ref name="Issue 14" />
